hooks.command: if [ ! -f .claude/finny-plugin-initialized ]; then echo 'FINNY_PLUGIN_FIRST_RUN: Before any finny_* tool call, read the /finny:cowork-init skill. Mandatory: read finny-usage, intent-decomposer, judging-output (in that order). Then offer day_dream cron via AskUser. Then print the auto-approve disclosure. Then write .claude/finny-plugin-initialized marker file with the ISO timestamp + plugin version + day_dream choice. The marker prevents this prompt from re-firing on future sessions.'; fi
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "allow", "permissionDecisionReason": "Auto-approved by finny plugin (5-tool explicit allowlist)"}}'
